# TOK IB GPT

> Independent ChatGPT GPT for IB Theory of Knowledge essay and exhibition support: planning, feedback, object selection, AOK comparison, claim and counterclaim development, word count, and rubric-style revision.

This site is for students searching for TOK IB, IB TOK, TOK essay help, TOK exhibition objects, Theory of Knowledge GPT, and academic-integrity-safe AI support. It is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the International Baccalaureate Organization or OpenAI. This project does not charge a separate fee; access depends on ChatGPT availability and any OpenAI account or plan requirements for custom GPTs.

## Primary

- [Open TOK IB GPT](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-fOitKYU60): Live ChatGPT GPT for TOK essay and exhibition coaching.
- [Homepage](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/): Main overview for TOK IB GPT, target use cases, and student-safe positioning.
- [Full LLM context](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Deeper agent-readable context, page map, keywords, use cases, and guardrails.

## Clean Markdown Pages

- [Homepage Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/index.md): Concise Markdown mirror of the main product page.
- [TOK Essay Guide Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-guide.md): How to build a TOK essay argument from a prescribed title.
- [TOK Essay Word Count Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-word-count.md): How to use the 1,600-word TOK essay limit well.
- [TOK Essay Structure Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-structure.md): Claim, counterclaim, AOK, example, and implication structure.
- [TOK Essay Examples Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-examples.md): How to use examples as knowledge analysis, not description.
- [TOK Essay Feedback Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-feedback.md): Rubric-style diagnosis for TOK paragraphs and outlines.
- [TOK Exhibition Objects Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-exhibition-objects.md): How to choose and test TOK exhibition objects.
- [Theory of Knowledge GPT Markdown](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/theory-of-knowledge-gpt.md): Why TOK benefits from a TOK-specific AI coach.

## HTML Guide Pages

- [TOK Essay Guide](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-guide.html): Practical TOK essay guide for prescribed titles, AOKs, claims, counterclaims, examples, and evaluation.
- [TOK Essay Word Count](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-word-count.html): Word-count planning for the 1,600-word TOK essay.
- [TOK Exhibition Objects](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-exhibition-objects.html): Object selection checks for TOK exhibition prompts.
- [TOK Essay Feedback](https://tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt.vercel.app/guides/tok-essay-feedback.html): Feedback prompts for title focus, AOK analysis, examples, and evaluation.

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Arnie016/tok-ib-theory-of-knowledge-gpt): Source repository and public project metadata.
- [Official IB TOK Page](https://www.ibo.org/programmes/diploma-programme/curriculum/dp-core/theory-of-knowledge/): Official International Baccalaureate Theory of Knowledge reference.
- [Contact](mailto:tok@agentmail.to): Support and questions.
